evaluation.note: switched coupling produces transverse contraction (Psi<0), but the stability boundary does NOT depend on T_swt in this minimal build: the N=2 isolated layer is a limit cycle (lambda_max~0, verified), so the transverse mode does not expand during off-phases and any coupling contracts. The paper's slow-switching instability at N=2 is NOT reproduced here. The switching-TIME dependence is instead reproduced by the large-N direct simulation (Gate G0).
